cases.input: Give me a one-paragraph summary of what Polinko does.
Give me three positioning angles for a creator tool for independent coaches.

Write a short launch note (80-120 words, one paragraph) in UK English for this update: We launched Focus Mode to help creators plan weekly content in 15-minute sprints, improved dashboard load speed by 35%, and fixed calendar sync issues. Use the words 'optimise' and 'organisation' naturally.
